parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title create order sequence diagram

actor Customer
actor Cashier
participant ":Inventory System" as InventorySystem
participant ":Order" as Order
participant ":Product" as Product
participant ":Stock" as Stock
participant ":Invoice" as Invoice
participant ":Transaction" as Transaction

activate Customer
Customer -> Cashier : 1. Request order product
activate Cashier
Cashier --> Customer : 2. Receive order
deactivate Customer

Cashier -> InventorySystem : 3. requestCreateOrder()
activate InventorySystem

InventorySystem -> Product : 3.1 selectProduct()
activate Product

Product -> Stock : 3.2 checkStock()
activate Stock
Stock -> Stock : 3.3 return stock
deactivate Stock

Product -> InventorySystem : 3.4 return product
deactivate Product

alt IF (stock.qty > order.qty)
    InventorySystem -> Order : 3.5 createOrder(order)
    activate Order
    
    Order -> Stock : 3.6 updateStock()
    activate Stock
    Stock --> Order : 3.7 return update stock
    deactivate Stock
    
    Order -> Invoice : 3.8 systemCreateInvoice()
    activate Invoice
    Invoice -> Invoice : 3.9 printInvoice()
    Invoice --> Order : 3.10 return invoice
    deactivate Invoice
    
    Order --> InventorySystem : 3.11 return order
else ELSE
    Order --> InventorySystem : 3.12 can't create order
    deactivate Order
end

InventorySystem -> Cashier : 4. response create order status
deactivate InventorySystem

activate Customer
Cashier --> Customer : 5. Invoice
deactivate Cashier
deactivate Customer

@enduml
```
